fields.helpText: The value of this field is a string that represents the name of an instrument.

The value of this field is a code that indicates whether or not the C-Store program for this instrument is currently running. A value of 1 indicates that the program has started successfully. A value of 0 indicates that no connection is currently active.
The value of this field is a date/time string that represents the timestamp for the time that the most recent connection was either established or relinquished.

The value of this field is a code that indicates whether or not an association is currently established for this instrument. A value of 1 indicates that an association is established. A value of 0 indicates that no association is currently established.
The value of this field is a date/time string that represents the fimestamp for the time that the most recent association was either established or terminated.
